title: rubus × cinnamomeus
intro: Rubus × cinnamomeus, also known as the Hybrid Raspberry or Cinnamon Raspberry, is a plant species that belongs to the Rosaceae family, being a cross between the red raspberry (Rubus idaeus) and the black raspberry (Rubus occidentalis). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high antioxidant content, which has been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Rubus × cinnamomeus include its ability to support cardiovascular health, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Rubus × cinnamomeus can be prepared in various forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed fresh or dried to reap its medicinal benefits.
